title: Clinic Assistant
description:
Responsibilities


- Provide front-line services such as registering patients, coordinating, and scheduling appointment for patients, attending emails and call /message enquiries for patients

- Provide day-to-day administrative and clinical support for the clinic

- Handle finance matters such as issuing invoices, collecting payments and daily settlements

- Assist specialist with patients' medical reviews in the consultation rooms, explanation of condition to patient and their family members, measurement taking for patient and fitting of scoliosis braces

- Fitting of orthopedic appliances/compression garments for in-patient at nearby hospitals or patients in other private clinics

- Inventory control

- Other ad-hoc duties assigned


Requirements


- Candidate must be a Singaporean/PR

- Candidate must possess at least A level or equivalent

- Able to multi-task and work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment

- A team player with good interpersonal, customer service and numeracy skills

- IT Savvy and well-versed in Microsoft Office Suite

- Quick-witted, Self-initiated, Willing to learn

- Proficient in English

- No experience required, training is provided

- Working days from Tuesday to Saturdays

We regret that only short-listed applicants will be notified. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your information to prospective employers.



Interested applicants, please email your detailed resume to: lifeforcelimbs@yahoo.com.sgand we thank you for your interest in this position.

postedCompany.description:
Lifeforce Limbs & Rehab Pte Ltd was founded in 1996 and is specialized in Orthopaedic and Prosthetic services. In the year 2000, our limb centre is established within Singapore General Hospital and we started to provide our clinical services and products to their inpatients and outpatients. Since then, we have provided solutions to many satisfied patients and we aim to established as a one-stop hub offering a wide range of braces, supports and devices to help people achieve better quality of life.

In 2015, Lifeforce introduced the 3D CAM CAD System to enhance our existing services to patients and are one of the few providers in Southeast Asia to house a full range of CAD CAM System. With our well trained and experienced team of CPO, Clinical team and Technicians, we focus on better quality control to bring our services to a higher level.

In the same year, Lifeforce officially starts to distribute for one of the most Reputable Orthopaedic and Compression Brands; Medi (Germany) which was founded since 1951 and had evolved its products from traditional craftmanship to intelligent high tech products. We had also received specialized trainings in Germany for its products.

A Specialist Clinic at Orchard Lucky Plaza was set up in 2017 where services are provided for our patients  – patients with orthopaedic-related mobility problems; who require Scoliosis brace, Prosthesis and patients who requires compression garments.

We are also certified with “Good Distribution Practice for Medical Devices (GDPMDS) – Import, Storage, Distribution, Installation and Servicing of Technical Aids for the Disabled Persons” This ensures that the prosthetics and orthotics we manufacture complies with the mandatory quality standards.
postedCompany.name: LIFEFORCE LIMBS & REHAB PTE LTD
